body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dashboard Diagnosis** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Metacognition — self-awareness, self-monitoring, neural correlates of meta-awareness.

**Neural correlates of metacognitive ability and of feeling confident: alarge-scale fMRI study.**. Soc Cogn Affect Neurosci.. PMID: 27445213. DOI: 10.1093/scan/nsw093. One important aspect of metacognition is the ability to accurately evaluate one'sperformance. People vary widely in their metacognitive ability and in general are too confident when evaluating their performance. This often leads to poor decision making with potentially disastrous consequences.
